description: Legal document. Written and signed by Hillel b. ʿEli (fl. 1066–1108 CE). Unusual format. The trustee ("al-neʾeman") Yefet b. Elʿazar, who is the representative of al-Maḥalla, and the 4 undersigned elders of Fustat (ʿUlla b. Yosef ha-Levi, Nissim b. Nahray, Yeshuʿa b. Yakhin, Ṣedaqa b David ha-Kohen), agree to unite (יתעצבו) on behalf of plaintiffs in the Jewish courts who have rights against other people. There are at least two more agreements involving communal affairs. The same Yefet b. Elʿazar is the addressee of T-S 13J19.6. (Information from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי. נכתב וחתום על ידי הלל ב. עלי (פעיל 1066–1108 לספירה). הנאמן יפת ב. אלעזר, נציג אל-מחלה, וארבעה זקנים מפוסטאט מסכימים לפעול יחד בשם מתלוננים בבתי הדין היהודיים
